canonical_production.dashboard_rename_howto: Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → General → Project name (display label only; ref fyqvmbrgyncthksbgrrr does not change). Direct link below.

development_testing.purpose: Full clone of production (schema + data + auth users) for the development/testing environment. Created 2026-06-03. Treat data as sensitive as prod.
development_testing.clone_notes: Cloned via pg_dump (public/auth/storage) + pg_restore. Standard Supabase API-role grants (anon/authenticated/service_role) re-applied after restore since --no-acl stripped them. Storage object metadata (116 rows) copied; underlying file bytes live in prod's storage backend and were not transferred.
development_testing.schema_repair_2026_06_04: The original pg_restore silently dropped the entire post-data section: public schema had 0 PKs/FKs/unique constraints/indexes (only inline CHECKs survived). Symptom: super-admin /projects empty because PostgREST embedded join stores->clients(name) failed with PGRST200 (no FK relationship). Fix: re-derived DDL from prod via MCP and applied to test — 66 PKs, 27 unique, 95 FKs, 223 indexes, 25 triggers (now exactly matches prod). Also deduped product_image_mirrors (12191->11657, double-loaded rows) before adding its unique constraint. Reloaded PostgREST schema cache (NOTIFY pgrst). Super-admin login chethan@vizsoft.in password reset in TEST only to 'SuperAdmin!2026Test'.

woosync_new_20260429.note: Separate MCP-created project; not the primary DB used for full migration runs unless you intentionally switched Vercel env to it.

zip_from_old_dump_and_cli.note: Historical snapshot / old link only. Use canonical_production for dashboards and DATABASE_URL.
